name: SDSU SODEXO-DYKHOUSE STADIUM GROUND LEVEL CONCESSIONS

violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Ensure volunteer employees are washing their hands prior to working with food items.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Store personal beverages used by volunteers below and away from work surfaces. Store beverages in containers that restrict hand to mouth contact surfaces.--Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Hair restraints needed for those volunteers working with/preparing food items.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Store ice buckets off floor in concession stands and commissary areas.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed in concessions stands.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Loading bay used as silverware rolling station.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store single service items off floor in concession stands.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean. Hand sinks need cleaning.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Ensure accessibility is maintained at all hand sinks. Multiple hand sinks have items stored in/on/around limiting accessibiliy.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Multiple hand sinks used as dump sinks.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Multiple hand sinks in concession stands not working or not stocked with towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in all concessions stands and commissary areas.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
